report.summary: Cycle 6 standup: 3 agent cycles since v5 (build, publish, eod). 2 new learn guides created (RWA Tokenization + CLARITY Act), publish queue fully emptied at 611 slugs. 20 uncommitted files — commit+push needed to deploy. 25 total agent cycles today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V5 STANDUP: 3 agent cycles completed — build-v4 (2 new learn guides: RWA Tokenization + CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield), publish-v3 (confirmed queue empty at 611 slugs), eod-v4 (full QA pass, 2 pages promoted earlier confirmed).
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 607 (v5) → 611 (publish-v3 confirmed). +4 net today from original 607. Publish queue is now EMPTY — all promotable pages have been published.

NEW CONTENT CREATED: RWA Tokenization guide (~3,000 words, $12B+ market, BlackRock BUIDL, Ondo Finance) + CLARITY Act guide (~2,800 words, stablecoin yield regulation, DeFi impact analysis). Both queued but not yet added to PUBLISH_QUEUE config — will need promotion in next cycle.
DEPLOY GAP: 20 uncommitted files in working tree including published-pages.ts changes. Until committed and pushed, Vercel won't deploy the latest 4 promoted pages. This is the #1 operational blocker.
MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC $68,688 (+1.94%), ETH $2,133 (+3.75%), SOL $83.86 (+1.08%), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear). CoinGecko/Alternative.me egress still blocked from sandbox.
SEO NOTE: 611 slugs published but only ~607 deployed (uncommitted delta). 103 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (17% gap, unchanged all day). 147 TS errors stable and non-blocking.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 6th standup of Apr 1. Agent runs today: standup ×6 (this), build ×4, publish ×3, design ×3, community ×2, eod ×4. Total: 25 agent cycles today (this is the 25th).

V5 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Promote all 4 queued pages — DONE (stablecoin-payments + omnichain-defi promoted by eod-v4; Alpenglow + DefAI status TBD). (2) Batch-scaffold 103 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED. (3) Verify deploy health — CANNOT VERIFY (sandbox egress blocked).

COMPLETED SINCE V5: Build-v4 created 2 new learn guides (RWA + CLARITY Act) with full SEO metadata, FAQs, and page.tsx files. Publish-v3 confirmed queue empty at 611. EOD-v4 ran full QA — no regressions, 6/6 API routes healthy in code.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P0 — 20 uncommitted files need commit+push for deploy (includes published-pages.ts). P1 — 103 missing page.tsx (unchanged all day, needs dedicated scaffolding cycle). P2 — 147 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback.

NEW ITEMS: 2 additional learn guides (RWA + CLARITY Act) created but not yet in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Effective queue: 2 pages pending formal promotion. 2 slug-mismatched pages still need manual fix (wallet-security, restaking).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + PUSH UNCOMMITTED CHANGES: 20 files including published-pages.ts are blocking Vercel deploy. The 4 pages promoted today won't be live until this happens. This is the single highest-leverage action — it unlocks indexing for all promoted content. Needs Jefe or a git-enabled cycle.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 NEW GUIDES TO PUBLISH_QUEUE: RWA Tokenization and CLARITY Act guides are production-ready (content, SEO, page.tsx all complete) but not yet in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Add them and promote in the next publish cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 103 MISSING PAGE.TXX: This has been a P1 carry-over ALL DAY across 6 standups. 103 published slugs returning noindex is the single biggest SEO surface gap. Needs a dedicated build cycle that prioritizes scaffolding over new content creation.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,881 (25 cycles: standup×6=$270, build×4=$932, publish×3=$165, design×3=$180, community×2=$82, eod×4=$252)
